scripts.build: bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target node --packages external && bun build ./bin/electrobun-vite.ts --outfile ./dist/electrobun-vite.js --target bun --packages external && bun build ./bin/create-electrobun.ts --outfile ./dist/create-electrobun.js --target bun --packages external && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && chmod +x ./dist/electrobun-vite.js ./dist/create-electrobun.js
